text: If restricted visibility encountered in an accommodation fire, you would

options.text: B) Stand up straight to keep your head above smoke
C) Use of a fan to blow smoke and flames
D) Rig lifelines to assist a retreat

explanation: In heavy smoke conditions during an accommodation fire, it is essential to stay low to breathe cleaner air and to use lifelines or guides to maintain orientation and facilitate retreat. Standing upright would expose you to the hottest smoke.
